about-machine-p7q8r9.query: About Us Four Decades of Manufacturing Excellence Founded in 1985, ARTITECT MACHINERY has grown from a small workshop into a global leader in sheet metal folding technology. Our commitment to innovation and quality has made us the trusted partner of manufacturers worldwide. Every machine we produce undergoes rigorous testing and quality control, ensuring it meets the highest industry standards. From double folding machines to heavy-duty metal folders, our products are engineered to deliver precision, reliability, and value. 98% Customer Satisfaction Rate Since 1985 Trusted Worldwide precision machinery
